channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PNB] Punjab National Bank Announces Changes in Senior Management
item.description:
Punjab National Bank has announced changes in its senior management with effect from 01.04.2026. The new appointments include Firoz Hasnain as Chief General Manager, DBTD, Head Office; Sunil Kumar Goyal as Chief General Manager, Operations (ADC & Recon and Data Privacy & Management), Head Office; Sanjay Gupta as Chief General Manager, Inspection Audit Division, Head Office; Rajesh Prasad as General Manager, General Banking Division, Office Zonal Manager - CGM , Zonal Office, Delhi; Parveen Goyal as Zonal Manager – CGM, Zonal Office, Lucknow; Sanjeev Kumar Dhupar as General Chief Manager, BA & RM Division , Head Office; Surindar Singh Pal as Zonal Manager – CGM, Zonal Office, Jaipur; Mrityunjay as Chief Manager, Review Monitoring General Credit and –.TPTI HeadOffice: Plot No. 4. Sector - 10. Dwarka. New Delhi 1 10074+rai& -' ;M + xi• Board & Cmd. _ J $OS Dwtsbn gp / O +o n. '. aqa-IS’ \\t !i> /e B& S c \\ T q: \\ + n + q4Sv pun lab national bank ...the name you can BANK upon ! Atish Rout Kumar as Head, DBTD, Office; and Ashish Kumar Chaturvedi as Zonal Manager - CGM , Zonal Office Raipur.

  • Punjab National Bank has announced changes in its senior management.
  • Firoz Hasnain appointed as Chief General Manager, DBTD, Head Office.
  • Sunil Kumar Goyal appointed as Chief General Manager, Operations, Head Office.
  • Sanjay Gupta appointed as Chief General Manager, Inspection Audit Division, Head Office.
  • Rajesh Prasad appointed as General Manager, General Banking Division, Zonal Office, Delhi.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Category: New Launch

item.title: [V2RETAIL] V2 Retail Ltd Reports 61% Revenue Growth in FY26, Expands to 325 Stores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

V2 Retail Ltd has reported a robust financial performance for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company's revenue stood at ₹ 798 Cr in Q4 FY26, a 59% YoY growth. The same store sales growth (SSSG) was 7.74% in Q4 FY26. The company's monthly sales per square feet (PSF) reached ₹ 794 during Q4FY26. V2 Retail Ltd opened 33 new stores and closed 2 stores during the quarter, expanding its retail footprint to ~35 lakh square feet across India. The standalone revenue from operations grew by 61% to ₹ 3,060 Cr in FY26.

  • Standalone revenue at ₹ 798 Cr in Q4 FY26, up 59% YoY
  • SSSG of 7.74% in Q4 FY26
  • Monthly sales per square feet at ₹ 794 in Q4 FY26
  • Aggressive network expansion with 33 new stores in Q4 FY26
  • Standalone revenue from operations grew by 61% to ₹ 3,060 Cr in FY26

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: V2 RETAIL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [POONADAL] Poona Dal & Oil Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window for Quarter and Year Ended 31st March 2026
item.description:
Poona Dal & Oil Industries Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all specified persons until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026. The board meeting date for the financial results declaration will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window closed for all specified persons until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026
  • Board meeting date for financial results declaration will be informed in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POONA DAL & OIL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RCIIND] RCI Industries & Technologies Ltd Changes Name to JTL Defence Limited
item.description:
RCI Industries & Technologies Ltd has changed its name to JTL Defence Limited. This change is in continuation to the company's earlier intimation dated February 12, 2026, where shareholders' approval for the name change and consequent alteration of the Memorandum and Articles of Association was obtained. The company received a fresh Certificate of Incorporation pursuant to the change of name from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, and the name change is effective from April 01, 2026. The company will update its name with the stock exchange, depositories, and other statutory authorities in due course.

  • RCI Industries & Technologies Ltd has changed its name to JTL Defence Limited.
  • The name change is pursuant to shareholders' approval and receipt of a fresh Certificate of Incorporation.
  • The effective date of the name change is April 01, 2026.
  • The company will update its name with relevant authorities in due course.
  • This change does not affect the rights and liabilities of stakeholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RCI Industries & Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GHCLTEXTIL] GHCL Textiles Ltd: Reconstitution of Committees Following Director Changes
item.description:
GHCL Textiles Ltd has reconstituted its committees following the completion of Justice Ravindra Singh's term as an Independent Director and the appointment of Mr. Alok Raj as an Independent Director. The company has also updated the composition of the Nomination & Remuneration Committee, Stakeholders Relationship Committee, Risk Management Committee, and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee. The changes were made in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013 and SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

  • Justice Ravindra Singh (Retd.) completed his term as Independent Director, and Mr. Alok Raj was appointed as an Independent Director.
  • The company has reconstituted various committees in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013 and SEBI regulations.
  • The Nomination & Remuneration Committee, Stakeholders Relationship Committee, Risk Management Committee, and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee have new compositions.
  • Mr. Marshal, the CEO of the company, has been appointed as a member of the Risk Management Committee.
  • The changes in committee composition and appointments were approved through a circular resolution dated April 01, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GHCL Textiles Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NETLINK] Netlink Solutions India Ltd: New Company Secretary & Compliance Officer Appointed After Resignation of Previous Officer
item.description:
At the Board of Directors meeting held on April 01, 2026, Netlink Solutions India Ltd announced the resignation of Ms. Aarushi Hasmukh Lad as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer due to the change in management and control following the completion of the open offer under the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Ms. Komal Bairathi has been appointed as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company with effect from April 02, 2026.

  • Resignation of Ms. Aarushi Hasmukh Lad as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer due to change in management and control.
  • Appointment of Ms. Komal Bairathi as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NETLINK SOLUTIONS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHRIRAMFIN] Shriram Finance's Penalties Reduced by Commercial Tax Officer, Chennai South
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shriram Finance Ltd. has received a Rectification Order from the Commercial Tax Officer, Chennai South, reducing the penalties imposed on the company for the financial years 2018-19 and 2019-20. The original penalties were Rs.13,03,53,551/- for FY 2018-19 and Rs.24,06,19,502/- for FY 2019-20. These have been reduced to Rs. 70,42,822/- and Rs. 1,02,20,890/- respectively. The company has forwarded the copies of the Rectification Orders to the concerned officer and has made the necessary intimation under the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shriram Finance Ltd. receives Rectification Order from Commercial Tax Officer, Chennai South
  • Penalties for FY 2018-19 and 2019-20 reduced
  • Original penalties were Rs.13,03,53,551/- for FY 2018-19 and Rs.24,06,19,502/- for FY 2019-20
  • Reduced penalties are Rs. 70,42,822/- for FY 2018-19 and Rs. 1,02,20,890/- for FY 2019-20
  • Company has forwarded the Rectification Orders to the concerned officer and made necessary intimation

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Finance Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [NETLINK] Netlink Solutions India Ltd: Company Secretary & Compliance Officer Resigns, New Appointment Approved
item.description:
Netlink Solutions India Ltd announced the resignation of Ms. Aarushi Hasmukh Lad from the position of Company Secretary & Compliance Officer due to a change in management and control following the completion of an open offer under the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Board has approved the appointment of Ms. Komal Bairathi as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company with effect from April 02, 2026.

  • Resignation of Ms. Aarushi Hasmukh Lad as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
  • Change in management and control due to completion of open offer under SAST Regulation
  • Appointment of Ms. Komal Bairathi as new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
  • Effective date of new appointment: April 02, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NETLINK SOLUTIONS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GAUDIUMIVF] Gaudium IVF Introduces Al-Led Infertility Treatment, Marking an Industry First in India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Gaudium IVF, an innovation leader in India’s fertility healthcare sector, has introduced art | intelligence (Al)-led infertility treatment, integrating advanced Al-driven embryology systems, including SiD (Sperm Identification Device) and ERICA (Embryo Ranking Intelligent Classification Assistant) into routine clinical practice. This milestone was formally inaugurated by Hon’ble Union Minister Shri Nitin Jairam Gadkari, Minister for Road Transport and Highways, Government of India. The integration has been undertaken in collaboration with IVF 2.0, a UK-headquartered embryology innovation organisation. The newly introduced technologies are designed to enhance critical stages of the IVF process, improving precision and consistency, and have the potential to reduce the need for repeat cycles.

  • Gaudium IVF introduces Al-led infertility treatment in India
  • Integration of advanced Al-driven embryology systems: SiD and ERICA
  • Inauguration by Hon’ble Union Minister Shri Nitin Jairam Gadkari
  • Collaboration with UK-headquartered embryology innovation organisation IVF 2.0
  • New technologies designed to enhance critical stages of the IVF process

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gaudium IVF and Women Health Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SANATHAN] Sanathan Textiles Completes Phase I Ramp-Up at Punjab Facility, Boosting Growth
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sanathan Textiles Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary, Sanathan Polycot Private Limited, has successfully completed the ramp-up of Phase I at its Punjab facility. The plant is now operating at approximately 96% of its installed capacity, reflecting strong execution capabilities and robust demand absorption. This achievement strengthens Sanathan Textiles’ position as an integrated and diversified polyester yarn manufacturer in Punjab and enhances its ability to serve customers efficiently while improving cost competitiveness.

  • Sanathan Textiles has completed the ramp-up of Phase I at its Punjab facility, with the plant now operating at approximately 96% of its installed capacity.
  • The completion of Phase I enhances Sanathan Textiles’ position as an integrated and diversified polyester yarn manufacturer in Punjab.
  • The Punjab plant is a strategic addition to Sanathan Textiles’ manufacturing footprint, improving cost competitiveness and serving customers efficiently.
  • Sanathan Textiles remains focused on advancing its expansion roadmap, including the planned progression towards Phase II.
  • The achievement reflects Sanathan Textiles’ strong operational discipline, market positioning, and the growing demand from North India’s textile ecosystem.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sanathan Textiles Ltd | Category: Monthly Update
